title: Discuss your reactions to this
wikitext:
[]: Discuss your reactions to this (Spoilers? Probably) Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Aug 09, 2009 6:53 pm Consider the following: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pm8MoYvdNpQ http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aBsKoOuNreA#t=1m15s How does this make you feel?

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Aug 09, 2009 7:14 pm First two I understand, but the videos make me confused of what message is supposed to be conveyed.

[]: Post by Joe_Mo » Sun Aug 09, 2009 7:21 pm yeah i agree they're similar.

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Sun Aug 09, 2009 7:47 pm Dracula you really should just get it over and done with and create your own '' Rebuild of Eva is a Gundam copy '' thread. I'd love to see what sort of reception it gets. First two I understand, but the videos make me confused of what message is supposed to be conveyed.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:00 pm I whole heatedly agree with this

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:18 pm What is the second image supposed to be? A mecha from another anime(Gundam)? If that's the case and if you are asking how do we feel if Unit-06 is similar to it that? Then I would saaaaaaaaay... That it isn't really a big deal. But it might be a big deal to die hard Gundam fans.

[]: Post by Marduk » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:23 pm Interesting... The difference here is that Kaworu wants to score with Shinji, not Eva-01 :P

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:26 pm I would probably take the upper picture with a grain of salt considering Mark 06 in the actual movie looks completely different. It also should be noted that Mark 06 in the 3.0 preview has NO visor whatsoever, and instead looks more like a carbon copy of Eva Unit- 01 with a different blue color. EDIT: 100th post, lol

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:49 pm This whole thread is just another opputunity to have a dig at the new movie for ''apparently'' being a ''Gundamalike''. It's not after opinions it's function is to make a statement and moan. Im getting tired of this already. The comparisons mean very little in reality. Honestly so what if they look slightly similar. I suppose the idea is that we are all supposed to suddenly agree that the new movie is copying Gundam and makes no sense. The evidence is damning after all.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:53 pm Um . . . big no?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:04 pm REICHUUU!

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:15 pm Sammaeloo wrote: First two I understand, but the videos make me confused of what message is supposed to be conveyed.

[]: Post by schismatics » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:52 pm Meh. What cha gunna do. Don't bother me. (Rebuild is still vastly superior to 00 by the way)

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:32 pm I heard somewhere that Anno is a Tomino fan...

[]: Post by Ingrod » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:08 pm The use of kindergarden music in both scenes pretty different: In Gundam 00 is used how background music to words in a final scene, in a much more conventional manner. In 2.0 is used how lead theme in the scene creating a counterpoint and a much more intense dramatic effect, in a style akin to the use of the "Komm, süßer Tod" song in the EoE climax.

[]: Post by trueno_twentyone » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:54 pm there's no point in comparing Evangelion with Gundam... Evangelion is way more better than Gundam, I know because i used to be a fan of Gundam...

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 10, 2009 12:15 am ( DONT HURT ME ) I still love Gundam.......BUT EVAS HAVE AT FIELDS.

[]: Post by Combs » Mon Aug 10, 2009 1:05 am Does the gundam have two horns on the forehead with a circular space in between? Does it have a blue/yellow colour scheme? Is it proportioned like a human? Is its pilot a grey haired bishounen thats possibly bro's with the pilot of the mech it's design is re-used for? Was it constructed on the moon? Has said bishounen shared a bath with said bro in a previous canon? Has their been proposal's from the gundam fandom that said pilot of this black mech has a female reproduction system? yes? no? You also accidentally the palm on my face.
